title: Sharpeak 198H-SPK Professional Electric Knife Sharpener with Versatile 3 Stages, Monocrystalline Diamond Wheels, Overheat Protection, Ultra-Quiet Motor, Quick Kitchen Knives Sharpening, Easy to Use
features: 𝗤𝘂𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗥𝗮𝘇𝗼𝗿-𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗽 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗽𝗲𝗻𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗰𝗲𝘀𝘀: Precision-engineered slots transform dull knives into exceptional cutting tools. Coarse Diamond Wheels in Slot 1 efficiently reshape and restore edges, while Fine Diamond Wheels in Slot 2 enhance sharpness by honing the effects of coarse grinding. The Ceramic V Slot in Slot 3 achieves razor-sharpness through meticulous refining, polishing, and touch-ups.

𝗦𝘂𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗼𝗿 𝗡𝗼𝗶𝘀𝗲 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗼𝗹: Elevated noise levels in electrical products can signal deeper problems such as design flaws, excessive friction, and subpar components. Sharpeak stands out by expertly addressing these issues through precision components, reduced gaps, and noise induced by friction. With high-quality, quiet bearings and advanced airflow integration, Sharpeak ensures a low noise, user-friendly experience.

𝗛𝗶𝗴𝗵 𝗤𝘂𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗘𝗹𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗿𝗼𝗽𝗹𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗗𝗶𝗮𝗺𝗼𝗻𝗱 𝗪𝗵𝗲𝗲𝗹𝘀: Sharpeak utilizes high-quality electroplated diamond wheels, surpassing commonly used low-cost abrasive wheels. Monocrystalline Diamond Wheels do not temper knives, ensuring their hardness remains uncompromised. They efficiently sharpen blades with precision, minimal material removal, and deliver consistent, controlled, and uniform results.

𝗥𝗲𝘃𝗼𝗹𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗿𝘆 𝗗𝘂𝗮𝗹-𝘀𝗵𝗮𝗳𝘁 𝗜𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗰𝗼𝗻𝗻𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗠𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗮𝗻𝗶𝘀𝗺: Sharpeak's cutting-edge design features two interconnected parallel shafts, optimizing the sharpening process. Precisely calibrated rotational speed variances between coarse and fine slots enhance efficiency and accuracy while preserving your knife's lifespan. The coarse slot reduces speed to prevent over-sharpening, while the fine slot operates at an increased speed to achieve razor sharpness.

𝗘𝗮𝘀𝘆 𝗧𝗼 𝗨𝘀𝗲: Sharpeak's innovative electric knife sharpener accommodates both blade bevels in each slot, ensuring efficient, symmetrical sharpening. Unlike most sharpeners, it simplifies the process by eliminating the need to remember specific angles and pressures. Its standard 20-degree angle suits most knives, offering impressive sharpness. The intuitive three-stage sharpening system makes it easy for anyone to achieve professional results.

𝗜𝗱𝗲𝗮𝗹 𝗙𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗼𝗳 𝗦𝘁𝘆𝗹𝗲 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗙𝘂𝗻𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆: Sharpeak is meticulously designed with a sleek, linear profile in pristine white, effortlessly harmonizing with any kitchen decor, adding an elegant touch to your culinary space. This artful blend of aesthetics and robustness guarantees longevity and reliability.

𝟯 𝗬𝗘𝗔𝗥𝗦 𝗼𝗳 𝗖𝗼𝗺𝗺𝗶𝘁𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗦𝘂𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗼𝗿 𝗔𝗳𝘁𝗲𝗿-𝗦𝗮𝗹𝗲 𝗦𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗶𝗰𝗲: Sharpeak, headquartered in CA, US with branches in Germany and Australia, ensures easy and cost-effective sharpening solutions. All products are rigorously tested to the highest standards.

Ideal for home kitchens seeking professional-grade sharpness. Set at a standard 20-degree angle, it accommodates most knives, optimizing sharpness efficiently. 60 dB Precision engineering with quiet bearings and optimized airflow significantly lowers noise, addressing design flaws and excessive friction for a serene sharpening experience. 70 ℃ Intelligent overheat protection at 70 ℃ to prevent motor burnout, ensuring safe, reliable sharpening performance. 325 grit High-cost electroplated diamond wheels for unmatched sharpening performance and durability. The 325 coarse grit effectively reshapes and revitalizes dull knife edges, ensuring superior edge restoration. 1000 grit 1000 fine grit wheel is ideal for honing edges to supreme sharpness after initial coarse grinding. For knives that aren't excessively dull, begin directly with the 1000 fine grit in slot 2. 3000 rpm A robust 3000 rpm motor designed to ensure optimal rotation speed for sharpening, enhancing sharpness with minimal material removal, thereby extending the blade's lifespan.
